channel.title: Jinba Auto Export Inventory
channel.description: Recently added used vehicles available for export from China.

item.title: BYD Sea Lion 05 EV 520KM Flagship Smart Navigation
item.description: Stock JB-0160: 2025 BYD Sea Lion 05 EV 520KM Flagship Smart Navigation with 5,200 km indicated mileage. Confirm availability, condition and export quotation before payment.

item.title: GAC GS3 2026 270T Comfort
item.description: Stock JB-0159: 2026 GAC GS3 2026 270T Comfort with 8,000 km indicated mileage. Confirm availability, condition and export quotation before payment.

item.description: Stock JB-0158: 2024 Luxeed S7 2024 Pro with 18,000 km indicated mileage. Confirm availability, condition and export quotation before payment.
